texto: I loved her the moment I laid eyes on her.She blinked - her thoughts at the time were of anotherI could not win her heart20 years and many others who did.I would have been there,any time - anywhere. I was there, though all those gaps all her heartaches - all her pain and still it was never me. Never me, never would be be.20 years holding out - I may have the real thing in the next 20 years - still it will never be her.I am not dead and she is not a ghost.save yourself - you can no longer save me.
explicacao: Citação de SmokinBrit sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I loved her the moment I laid eyes on her.She blinked - her thoughts at the time were of anotherI…” articula amor, unrequited-love, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
